exec: // runId формат: только [a-z0-9], без точки, начинается с буквы — чтобы проходить compute name regex

item.name: SNP-CR-CRUD-OK — Create Snapshot из READY-тома → Operation(snp metadata) → poll → Get: snp-prefix, sourceVolumeId, status READY, sizeBytes==vol.sizeBytes, createdAt sec

exec: if (v !== undefined && v !== null) pm.environment.set('opId', String(v));
if (v !== undefined && v !== null) pm.environment.set('sourceVolumeId', String(v));
if (v !== undefined && v !== null) pm.environment.set('opId', String(v));
if (v !== undefined && v !== null) pm.environment.set('snapshotId', String(v));
pm.test('operation succeeded (response, no error)', () => pm.expect(Boolean(j.response) && !j.error, JSON.stringify(j)).to.eql(true));
// bounded read-your-writes retry over the owner-tuple materialization window
// (opgate removed -> eventual-consistency); retries SELF only on 403/404.
const _ard = Date.now(); while (Date.now() - _ard < 400) { /* owner-tuple materialization wait */ }
// RFC3339; если есть дробная часть — это .000... либо отсутствует
if (v !== undefined && v !== null) pm.environment.set('opId', String(v));
if (v !== undefined && v !== null) pm.environment.set('opId', String(v));

item.name: SNP-CR-NEG-SOURCE-MISSING — Create Snapshot из несуществующего sourceVolumeId → Operation error FAILED_PRECONDITION 'Volume <id> not found' (from-READY-CAS 0-row)

exec: if (v !== undefined && v !== null) pm.environment.set('opId', String(v));
pm.test('error text includes "Volume vol00000000000000000 not found"', () => pm.expect((j.error && j.error.message || '').toLowerCase()).to.include('volume vol00000000000000000 not found'));

item.name: SNP-CR-VAL-PROJECT-REQUIRED — Create Snapshot без projectId → 400 INVALID_ARGUMENT (project_id required)
SNP-CR-VAL-SOURCE-REQUIRED — Create Snapshot без sourceVolumeId → 400 INVALID_ARGUMENT (source_volume_id required)
SNP-CR-NEG-PROJECT-NOTFOUND — Create Snapshot с garbage projectId → sync FAILED_PRECONDITION 'Project <id> not found' (peer iam, request-path)

exec: pm.test('message includes "Project b1gnonexistent999999 not found"', () => pm.expect((pm.response.json().message || ''), JSON.stringify(pm.response.json())).to.include('Project b1gnonexistent999999 not found'));

item.name: SNP-CR-VAL-NAME-UPPERCASE — Create Snapshot name=Bad_Name (uppercase) → sync 400 INVALID_ARGUMENT 'Illegal argument name'

exec: pm.test('message includes "Illegal argument name"', () => pm.expect((pm.response.json().message || ''), JSON.stringify(pm.response.json())).to.include('Illegal argument name'));

item.name: SNP-CR-VAL-NAME-UNICODE — Create Snapshot name=снимок (кириллица/не-ASCII) → sync 400 INVALID_ARGUMENT 'Illegal argument name'

exec: pm.test('message includes "Illegal argument name"', () => pm.expect((pm.response.json().message || ''), JSON.stringify(pm.response.json())).to.include('Illegal argument name'));

item.name: SNP-GET-NEG-MALFORMED-ID — Get malformed snapshotId 'nope' → sync 400 INVALID_ARGUMENT 'invalid snapshot id 'nope''

exec: pm.test('message includes "invalid snapshot id \'nope\'"', () => pm.expect((pm.response.json().message || ''), JSON.stringify(pm.response.json())).to.include('invalid snapshot id \'nope\''));

item.name: SNP-GET-NEG-NOTFOUND — Get well-formed-но-нет snapshotId → 404 NOT_FOUND 'Snapshot <id> not found'

exec: pm.test('message includes "Snapshot snp00000000000000000 not found"', () => pm.expect((pm.response.json().message || ''), JSON.stringify(pm.response.json())).to.include('Snapshot snp00000000000000000 not found'));

item.name: SNP-DEL-NEG-NOTFOUND — Delete well-formed-но-нет snapshotId → Operation error NOT_FOUND 'Snapshot <id> not found' (0-row DELETE)

exec: if (v !== undefined && v !== null) pm.environment.set('opId', String(v));

item.name: SNP-LST-BVA-PAGESIZE-OVER-MAX — List snapshots pageSize=5000 (> max 1000) -> 400 INVALID_ARGUMENT (validate.PageSize; парити с Volume/Image)
SNP-UPD-MASK-UNKNOWN-FIELD — Update mask=nonexistent_field -> sync 400 INVALID_ARGUMENT (UpdateMask known-set; парити с Volume)
SNP-UPD-MASK-IMMUTABLE-PROJECT — Update mask=project_id -> sync 400 INVALID_ARGUMENT 'project_id is immutable after Snapshot.Create' (immutable-switch до UpdateMask)

exec: pm.test('message includes "project_id is immutable after Snapshot.Create"', () => pm.expect((pm.response.json().message || ''), JSON.stringify(pm.response.json())).to.include('project_id is immutable after Snapshot.Create'));

item.name: SNP-UPD-MASK-IMMUTABLE-SIZE — Update mask=size_bytes -> sync 400 INVALID_ARGUMENT 'size_bytes is immutable after Snapshot.Create'

exec: pm.test('message includes "size_bytes is immutable after Snapshot.Create"', () => pm.expect((pm.response.json().message || ''), JSON.stringify(pm.response.json())).to.include('size_bytes is immutable after Snapshot.Create'));

item.name: SNP-CR-BVA-NAME-OVER-64 — Create Snapshot name длиной 64 (граница 1..63 + 1) -> sync 400 INVALID_ARGUMENT 'Illegal argument name' (BVA; парити с Volume/Image)

exec: pm.test('message includes "Illegal argument name"', () => pm.expect((pm.response.json().message || ''), JSON.stringify(pm.response.json())).to.include('Illegal argument name'));
